zh.Harewood, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾希亞活
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Wyman於大約1386年出生在英國越可爾希亞活時，她的父親Henry Wyman43歲，母親Agnes de Barden42歲。她於大約1399年與Sir William Gascoigne II在英國越可爾希亞活結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1432年在她的家鄉享年47歲，埋葬在英國越可爾瓦。

zh-hans.Harewood, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰越可爾希亞活
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Wyman于大约1386年出生在英国越可爾希亞活时，她的父亲Henry Wyman43岁，母亲Agnes de Barden42岁。她于大约1399年与Sir William Gascoigne II在英国越可爾希亞活结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1432年在她的家乡享年47岁，埋葬在英国越可爾瓦。

nameMeanings.name: Wyman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Wymund, Wymond (Old English Wīgmund, composed of the elements wīg ‘war’ + mund ‘protection’). In Lincolnshire, Leicestershire, and Norfolk the personal name may be the Old Norse cognate Vigmundr, Vimund.
Americanized form of North German   Weimann  . Compare   Wiman  .
History: John Wyman, from Hertfordshire, England, was one of the founders of Woburn, MA, in 1640.

variants.name: Weyman
meanings: English (Gloucestershire): variant of   Wyman   or   Waitman  .
Americanized form of German Weymann: variant of Weimann .

variants.name: Wiman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Holger, Sten.

Swedish: ornamental name composed of an altered form of the placename element vi (representing either Old Norse vithr ‘forest’ or vé ‘sacred place’) + man ‘man’, or a habitational name for someone from a place called with the element vi.
English: variant of   Wyman  . This form of the surname is virtually non-existing in Britain.

variants.name: Weimann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Wilhelm, Kurt, Fritz, Hans, Helmuth, Juergen, Reinhold.

variants.name: Wayment
meanings: English: variant of Waymont, a variant of Wyman .

variants.name: Wayman
meanings: English: variant of   Wyman   and   Waitman  .
Americanized form of German   Wehmann   and   Weidmann  .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Wyman was born about 1386, in Harewood, Yorkshire, England, her father, Henry Wyman, was 43 and her mother, Agnes de Barden, was 42. She married Sir William Gascoigne II about 1399, in Harewood, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1432, in her hometown, at the age of 47, and was buried in Wawne, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Wyman est née environ 1386, à Harewood, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Henry Wyman, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Barden, avait 42 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Gascoigne II environ 1399, à Harewood, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1432, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterrée à Wawne, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Wyman um 1386 in Harewood, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Wyman 43 und ihre Mutter Agnes de Barden 42. Sie hat um 1399 in Harewood, Yorkshire, England Sir William Gascoigne II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1432 im Alter von 47 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Wawne, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Wyman è nata il circa 1386 nel Harewood, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Henry Wyman, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Agnes de Barden, aveva 42 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Gascoigne II circa 1399, nel Harewood, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1432, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolta a Wawne, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Wymanが約1386年にイギリスヨークシュアイアハーエウッドで生まれた時，父Henry Wymanは43歳，母Agnes de Bardenは42歳であった。約1399年にイギリスヨークシュアイアハーエウッドでSir William Gascoigne IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1432年に故郷で47歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアワウンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Wyman(이)가 대략 1386년 영국 요르크실르 하레우드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Wyman(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes de Barden(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 대략 1399년 영국 요르크실르 하레우드에서 Sir William Gascoigne II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1432년 그녀의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 와w니에 묻혔다.

mn.Harewood, Yorkshire, England: Harewood, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Wyman nasceu aproximadamente 1386, em Harewood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Wyman, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Barden, tinha 42 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Gascoigne II aproximadamente 1399, em Harewood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1432, em sua cidade natal, com 47 anos, e foi sepultada em Wawne, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Wyman родилась около 1386 г. в местности харюуд, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry Wyman было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Barden, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Gascoigne II около 1399 г. в местности харюуд, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1432 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 47 лет и была похоронена в местности вавн, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Wyman nació aproximadamente 1386, en Harewood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Wyman, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Agnes de Barden, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Sir William Gascoigne II aproximadamente 1399, en Harewood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1432, en su pueblo, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultada en Wawne, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
